summary: QA is complete. Ship is the next governed step.

primary_next_actions.label: Run `/ship`
primary_next_actions.description: Record the release-gate decision and PR/deploy handoff.
primary_next_actions.visibility_reason: QA passed and ship is the canonical next governed step.

recommended_side_skills.label: Run `/benchmark`
recommended_side_skills.description: Attach performance evidence before the release gate.
recommended_side_skills.visibility_reason: Performance success criteria are explicit and measurable; benchmark evidence should attach at QA. Checklist-backed rationale: performance review/specialists/performance.md - Performance checklist applies to frontend or backend execution paths where rendering, query, bundle, or latency regressions are plausible.
recommended_side_skills.why_this_skill: Use this because the verification matrix ties this run to the performance checklists.

evidence_signal.summary: Verification matrix surfaced performance checklist coverage for this recommendation.

recommended_side_skills.label: Run `/design-review`
recommended_side_skills.description: Audit the visual result after QA on a design-bearing run.
recommended_side_skills.visibility_reason: Frame design-intent flagged major design impact with 8 affected surfaces. Real design contract required before /handoff.
recommended_side_skills.why_this_skill: Frame design-intent flagged major design impact with 8 affected surfaces. Real design contract required before /handoff.

evidence_signal.summary: Frame design-intent flagged major design impact with 8 affected surfaces. Real design contract required before /handoff.

recommended_side_skills.label: Run `/cso`
recommended_side_skills.description: Audit security-sensitive changes before the release gate advances.
recommended_side_skills.visibility_reason: Cloud API key handling, single-egress network module, and privacy-gating contract benefit from a security review pass before ship.
recommended_side_skills.why_this_skill: Cloud API key handling, single-egress network module, and privacy-gating contract benefit from a security review pass before ship.

evidence_signal.summary: Cloud API key handling, single-egress network module, and privacy-gating contract benefit from a security review pass before ship.

recommended_external_skills.label: Run installed skill `/finance-metrics-quickref`
recommended_external_skills.description: Fast lookup table for 32+ SaaS finance metrics with formulas, benchmarks, and when to use each. Includes red flags and decision frameworks.
recommended_external_skills.visibility_reason: Installed skill matches /qa because it is tagged performance.
recommended_external_skills.why_this_skill: Use this because the installed skill matches performance context for /qa.

recommended_external_skills.label: Run installed skill `/gh-address-comments`
recommended_external_skills.description: Help address review/issue comments on the open GitHub PR for the current branch using gh CLI; verify gh auth first and prompt the user to authenticate if not logged in.
recommended_external_skills.visibility_reason: Installed skill matches /qa because it is tagged security, auth.
recommended_external_skills.why_this_skill: Use this because the installed skill matches security, auth context for /qa.

evidence_signal.summary: Installed skill tags matched: security, auth.

recommended_external_skills.label: Run installed skill `/pol-probe-advisor`
recommended_external_skills.description: Select the right Proof of Life (PoL) probe based on hypothesis, risk, and resources. Use this to match the validation method to the real learning goal, not tooling comfort.
recommended_external_skills.visibility_reason: Installed skill matches /qa because it is tagged risk, qa.
recommended_external_skills.why_this_skill: Use this because the installed skill matches risk, qa context for /qa.

stop_action.label: Stop here
stop_action.description: Do not advance yet. Keep the current artifacts as-is and decide on the next step later.
stop_action.visibility_reason: Always available as the minimal non-advancing choice after a completed stage.
